data.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Updated tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh: header updated (19→20 skills, 15→16 sub-agent dependent), added check_guard_agent_tool "architect-foundation" to Group 1, added test_architect_foundation_has_sub_agent_guard_marker and test_architect_foundation_guard_references_agent_tool to _TEST_GATE_ANCHORS.
